positive: A whimsical, stylized portrait featuring a golden retriever puppy joyfully chasing a stylized watercolor rainbow through a meadow of oversized, bioluminescent clover flowers. The style is a blend of Art Nouveau illustration and vibrant sticker art, with thick, clean outlines and flat color fields, emphasized by high-contrast backlighting that creates sharp, charming silhouettes. Composition should be centralized and balanced, making the puppy the primary focal point. Color direction uses soft pastels (mint, lavender, baby blue) punctuated by rich golds and emerald greens. Perfect for repeating pattern tile or central apparel graphic, highly detailed but clean vector aesthetic. --ar 1:1
